plugins.name: kernel
plugins.description: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. v7.15: smarter memory retrieval — `agentdb recall` now dedups results, never leaks human-only learnings, and ranks on recalibrated relevance with hit_count split from session-load noise.
